user.title: Pollen DK - Astma-Allergi Danmark
user.description: Fetches daily pollen measurements from Astma-Allergi Danmark's measurement station(s). Data is updated once daily at approximately 16:00 CET.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Astma-Allergi Danmark API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred during setup.
